metadata.name: injection-manager
metadata.summary: An async-enabled injection framework for StarCraft data.

methods.name: injection_manager.typeclass.AsyncInjectable.AsyncInjectable.__tableschema__
documentation: Return the schema name. Must be implemented by subclasses.

methods.name: injection_manager.typeclass.Injectable.Injectable.__tableschema__
documentation: Return the schema name. Must be implemented by subclasses.

methods.name: injection_manager.managers.InjectionManager.InjectionManager.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the InjectionManager.
\:param metadata: SQLAlchemy metadata (Base.metadata).

methods.name: injection_manager.managers.InjectionManager.InjectionManager.inject
documentation:
Perform the injection process for a replay.
\:param replay: Parsed replay object to inject.
\:param session: Database session supporting flush, commit and rollback:

methods.name: injection_manager.managers.AsyncInjectionManager.InjectionManager.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the InjectionManager.
\:param metadata: SQLAlchemy metadata (Base.metadata).

methods.name: injection_manager.managers.AsyncInjectionManager.InjectionManager.inject
documentation:
Perform the injection process for a replay.
\:param replay: Parsed replay object to inject.
\:param session: Database session supporting flush, commit and rollback:

methods.name: injection_manager.managers.EventInjectionManager.EventInjectionManager.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the EventInjectionManager.
\:param base: SQLAlchemy Base, providing metadata and injectable models.

methods.name: injection_manager.managers.EventInjectionManager.EventInjectionManager._get_event
documentation:
Retrieve or create an asyncio.Event for a specific table.
\:param table_name: Fully qualified table name (e.g., schema.table).
\:return: asyncio.Event instance.

methods.name: injection_manager.managers.EventInjectionManager.EventInjectionManager.inject
documentation:
Perform the injection process using Event-based synchronization.
\:param replay: Parsed replay object to inject.
\:param session: Database session supporting flush, commit, and rollback.

methods.name: injection_manager.managers.EventInjectionManager.EventInjectionManager._inject_relation
documentation:
Inject a single relation, waiting for dependencies to complete.
\:param relation_cls: The model class to process.
\:param replay: Parsed replay object.
\:param session: Database session.
\:param dependencies: List of dependent table names.
